claims.statement: DET-RTS: battlefield lane mouse click routes through the single recordCommand('STRIKE') deterministic pipeline with 0-20% clamped spawn origin; Playwright E2E asserted spawn at ~14.93% for a 15%-width click, one-unit spawn, sprite img render, and focus consumption (3 to 2). Keyboard s/b/d/r paths unchanged.

DET-STAGE: STAGE_RT_PRESETS delivers per-stage real-time tempo (foeCooldown 3.5/3.2/3.0/2.8/2.5s, unitSpeed 33.3/33.3/36/36/40 %/s) in the presentation layer only; game-core.js reducer untouched; adaptive scripted driver cleared all 5 stages to VICTORY and settlement (10 fragments, wallet 4, resolve marks 2) in the same E2E run.

DET-RES: unit_strike.png and unit_brace.png generated via god-tibo-imagen (gti) with knight.png style reference, downscaled to 170x256 (39.8KB/47.0KB), wired into spawnUnit() with verbatim SVG-silhouette onerror fallback; fallback path manually triggered and confirmed in headless browser.

DET-QA: stage1-vertical-slice (2/2), playtest-5-stages (PASS), validate-cycle-retrospective suite (27/27), and full Playwright browser playtest (5 stages VICTORY, avatar-load asserts, lane-click assert, settlement summary) all passed on the post-change tree; visual evidence refreshed for desktop and mobile viewports.

DET-DOC: RTS keyboard+mouse identity recorded in llm-wiki report 2026-07-16-abyssal-surge-rts-kbm-direction.md (obsidian-cli write), wiki index line added, and repo docs/game-production-coordination-brief.md gained the append-only Cycle 005 section.

Cycle-004 records remain immutable and its P3 governance remediation unresolved; this run executed under the recorded user mandate handoff (C004-D-024) and claims no cycle-004 phase completion, QA PASS, or release authority on cycle-004's behalf.

assumptions.statement: Lane element binding relies on the #rts-units-layer fallback selector because index.html ships no #battlefield-lane id.
assumptions.validation_boundary: If index.html later renames or splits the lane element, the dom.battlefieldLane cache and the E2E lane-click assertion must be updated together in the same change.

assumptions.statement: Existing 16 ElevenLabs audio assets cover spawn/counter SFX needs; no new API spend was required this cycle.
assumptions.validation_boundary: New audio generation requires a fresh directive with cost note; do not call provider APIs implicitly.

next_action.scope: Stage-specific foe behaviors/unit variety beyond tempo presets, vox-director cutscene budget review with compresso, and APK (TWA/Capacitor) packaging survey for the mobile port
prohibited_work: game-core.js reducer semantic changes without a new directive
